title: Geolosys
body:
![Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oitsjustjose/Geolosys/master/Geolosys%20Logo.png)


## Effective Nov. 2022, Geolosys will no longer receive updates

Old versions will continue to work exactly as they do now, but Geolosys has become a chore to maintain.

Want to take it over? Reach out to me on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/oitsjustjose) or [My Mods' Discord Server](https://discord.oitsjustjose.com). **[See Full Tweet](https://twitter.com/oitsjustjose/status/1593367376808099841)**

-----

## Overview

Geolosys is a mod-compatibility-first Ore Generation overhaul mod that integrates *Geolo*gical *Sys*tems into Minecraft. Geolosys is highly configurable via Datapacks and comes with a pre-defined set of default resources to work with a large majority of tech mods!

### Learning More

For starters, the in-game field manual can teach players all they'll need to know about generation, Pluton types, resources and more. On top of that, the [wiki](https://mods.oitsjustjose.com/Geolosys) is full of even more information for mod developers, as well as our incredible community over on Discord!
